request.prompt:
Determine whether N.Flying has any publicly announced events after 2026-07-15 (concerts, tours, or fan meetings). Search for this artist only; do not bundle another artist.

Strict evidence rules: accept only an official artist/company source, promoter, venue, ticketing source, or reliable media. Exclude kpopofficial.com and all other event aggregators as evidence. Do not guess. A general tour announcement without a dated stop is not an event. If no qualifying public event is found, return NO_EVENTS_FOUND.

For every event you claim, the artist must match and you must provide the complete exact date or date range, venue, city/country, and a structured web-search citation with URL, title, and cited text that directly supports that same event. Do not claim an event without a citation.

Return only these fields in this order:
VERDICT: EVENTS_FOUND | NO_EVENTS_FOUND
EVENT_COUNT: <n>
EVENTS:
- ARTIST: ...
  DATES: ...
  VENUE: ...
  CITY_COUNTRY: ...
  SOURCE_CLASS: official_artist_company | promoter | venue | ticketing | reliable_media
  CITATION_URL: ...
  CITED_TEXT: ...
REASON: one short factual sentence

content.text: I'll search for N.Flying's upcoming events using multiple reliable source types simultaneously.

content.title: N.Flying Concert Tickets - 2026 Tour Dates.
N.Flying Concerts & Live Tour Dates: 2026-2027 Tickets | Bandsintown

N.Flying | チケットぴあ[チケット購入・予約]
N.Flying Tour 2026: &CON4 : FULL CIRCLE

N. Flying Tickets & 2026 Tour Dates
N.Flying Concerts & Live Tour Dates: 2026-2027 Tickets | Bandsintown

content.text: Now let me check the Songkick result more carefully and the Londoner Macao and Pia.jp sources. The Songkick result (index 10) mentions a Singapore show, and Pia.jp (index 13) mentions a Japan fan meeting on 2026/6/3. I need to verify whether these are after 2026-07-15. The Japan date (June 3, 2026) and the Seoul fan meeting (March 21–22, 2026) and Singapore are all **before** July 15, 2026. The Londoner Macao page needs a date check. Let me use my last search to verify the Macao and Singapore dates.

input.query: N.Flying fan concert Macao 2026 date Londoner

content.title: 2026 N.Flying FAN CONCERT ‘Let’s have some little talk’ IN MACAO | Entertainment | The Londoner Macao| Entertainment | The Londoner Macao
2026 Eunhyuk Fancon - Be:Ware of the… | The Beat Macau
N.Flying bring fan concert overseas with Taipei and Macau stops | allkpop
Macau Shows & Concerts | Macau Events, Activities | Londoner Macao
Time Capsule: JimmySea FanMeeting in Macao 2025
Jung Hae in Fan Meeting 'Our Time' in… | The Beat Macau
Macau | PONDPHUWIN RENDEZVOUS FANCON IN MACAU | Macau Fisherman's Wharf Convention and Exhibition Centre: Tickets, Dates & Itineraries | Trip.com
N.Flying Tour 2026: &CON4 : FULL CIRCLE
2026 N.Flying FAN CONCERT 'Let's have some little talk' ...
MACAU | 2026 NCT JNJM FANMEETING TOUR [DUALITY] | The Londoner Arena: Tickets, Dates & Itineraries | Trip.com

content.text:
I now have a complete picture. Here is my full analysis before rendering the verdict:

**Events found and their dates:**
- Seoul fan meeting: March 21–22, 2026 → **before** July 15, 2026 ❌
- Taipei fan concert: April 11–12, 2026 → **before** July 15, 2026 ❌
- Macao fan concert: May 9, 2026 → **before** July 15, 2026 ❌
- Japan fan meeting (Pia.jp): June 3, 2026 → **before** July 15, 2026 ❌
- Songkick mentions Singapore as the "final concert" of the tour — but no specific date after July 15 is confirmed with a qualifying source.
- Ticketmaster:

citations.cited_text: We're sorry, but we couldn't find any upcoming concerts for N.Flying.
citations.title: N.Flying Tickets, 2026 Concert Tour Dates | Ticketmaster

content.text: "We're sorry, but we couldn't find any upcoming concerts for N.Flying."

citations.cited_text: Unfortunately there are no concert dates for N.Flying scheduled in 2026.
citations.title: N.Flying Full Tour Schedule 2026 & 2027, Tour Dates & Concerts – Songkick

content.text: "Unfortunately there are no concert dates for N.Flying scheduled in 2026."

All confirmed, dated N.Flying events found in reliable/official sources fall **before** July 15, 2026. No qualifying source provides a dated N.Flying event after July 15, 2026.

---

**VERDICT:** NO_EVENTS_FOUND

**EVENT_COUNT:** 0

**EVENTS:** *(none)*

**REASON:** Every confirmed, specifically dated N.Flying event found across ticketing platforms (Ticketmaster, Live Nation), reliable media (Sports Khan, Starnews Korea, allkpop), and venue sources (Londoner Macao, Pia.jp) falls before July 15, 2026 (Seoul March 21–22, Taipei April 11–12, Macao May 9, Japan June 3); no qualifying source documents any N.Flying concert, tour stop, or fan meeting with a confirmed date after July 15, 2026.
